title: City of Destruction
subtitle: Awakening under a burden no home can soothe
intro: You wake before dawn with the book open in your hands and a burden on your back that no sleep can soften.
The city calls this fear, but the words on the page name it truth: judgment is coming, and your heart is not ready.
Those you love ask you to stay and be reasonable. Repentance begins when you stop pretending the house is safe because it is familiar.
spiritual_theme: Awakening, honest fear, and the first turn toward life
core_mechanic: Carry the burden through a familiar city, answer loved ones and mockers, and receive Evangelist's call to flee toward the narrow gate.

design.provenance: Attachment Ch1 灭亡城与觉醒 (Skill 15).

seven_beats.arrival: Wake before dawn, burdened and slow, in a grey doomed city under a distant firelight and a faint bell.
seven_beats.orientation: A ruined chapel leans with its tilted cross; the open book names the coming judgement.
seven_beats.encounter: Evangelist points past the wall to the far light and the narrow gate; Obstinate mocks; Pliable offers to come.
seven_beats.temptation: The fear of leaving the familiar — 'to leave all you know is to lose all you have.'
seven_beats.choice: Heed the call and flee / argue with Obstinate / linger at home / pray at the ruined chapel.
seven_beats.consequence: Heeding lifts faith and resolve; arguing breeds pride; lingering deepens fear and shame.
seven_beats.grace: Pass the city gate toward the wilderness, the burden still on your back but your face now turned to life.

chapel.verse_zh: 醒来吧，你这睡着的人，从死里复活。
chapel.verse_en: Awake, O sleeper, and arise from the dead.
chapel.hint_zh: 朝远处的光走，寻找窄门。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 为了书卷上几句话，就要离开熟悉的一切吗？

design.stat_arc_note: Opens with despair/shame/fear high and has_burden true; heeding the call begins to lift faith/perseverance.
